hero.title: Building Trust Through Transparent Trade
hero.subtitle: From humble beginnings to global partnerships, discover how Vaarunya transforms international trade through transparency, quality, and unwavering commitment to our partners.

story.title: Our Journey Began with a Vision
story.content: While working closely with rural entrepreneurs and small-scale manufacturers, our founder Mithilesh Varma witnessed a critical gap — despite having world-class potential, local producers were constrained by outdated systems, fragmented sourcing, and a lack of trust in the export process. These challenges inspired a bold question: What if global trade could truly serve those at the grassroots?
story.content2: Vaarunya was born from this idea — to connect rural India to global markets through ethical sourcing, structured compliance, and value-led partnerships. Vaarunya is not just an export house, it is a purpose-driven bridge connecting rural strength to global markets. With transparent sourcing and global-standard quality systems at its core, every shipment we deliver reflects our commitment to trusted partnerships, operational excellence, and meaningful global connections.
story.founderQuote: We don't just facilitate transactions; we build bridges between cultures, create lasting relationships, and turn the complexity of global trade into opportunities for growth.

team.name: Surya Teja Veeramachaneni
team.title: Chairman & Co-Founder
team.bio: Surya Teja Veeramachaneni is the Co-Founder and Chairman of Vaarunya Global EXIM, providing visionary leadership and shaping the company's strategic direction, governance, and long-term positioning. With a deep-rooted belief in sustainable growth and inclusive value creation, Surya Teja plays a key role in shaping Vaarunya's long-term strategy.
team.quote: Business is not just about profit; it's about building relationships that create value for everyone involved.

team.name: Rudraraju Mithilesh Varma
team.title: Founder & CEO
team.bio: Rudraraju Mithilesh Varma is the Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Vaarunya Global EXIM, the driving force behind its vision to redefine India's presence in global trade through an integrated, ethical, and impact-oriented export ecosystem that connects rural India directly to international markets.
team.quote: True leadership is not about commanding growth — it's about cultivating ecosystems where trust, impact, and innovation thrive from the grassroots to the globe.

team.name: Kusampudi Venkata Sriram Varma
team.title: Managing Director & Co-Founder
team.bio: Kusampudi Venkata Sriram Varma is the Co-Founder and Managing Director of Vaarunya Global EXIM, playing a pivotal role in steering the company's operational excellence and strategic growth. With a strong background in export management and business development.
team.quote: Success is not just achieving milestones, but creating a culture where purpose drives performance, and values guide every decision.

values.title: Transparency
values.subtitle: Core Value #1
values.description: We believe in complete openness in all our business dealings, from pricing to processes.
values.detail: Transparency is the cornerstone of trust in international trade. We provide complete visibility into our sourcing processes, quality checks, pricing structures, and delivery timelines. Our clients always know exactly what they're getting, when they'll get it, and what they're paying for.
practices: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
Open communication channels at all times

values.title: Quality
values.subtitle: Core Value #2
values.description: Uncompromising commitment to quality at every stage, from sourcing to delivery.
values.detail: Quality is not just a promise — it's our practice. We have implemented rigorous quality control measures at every stage of our operations, resulting in a 98% client satisfaction rate.

values.title: Partnership
values.subtitle: Core Value #3
values.description: Building long-term relationships based on mutual trust, respect, and shared success.
values.detail: We don't just facilitate transactions — we build partnerships. Our approach focuses on understanding our clients' long-term goals and working together to achieve them.

partnershipPrinciples.title: Long-term Thinking
partnershipPrinciples.description: We build relationships for decades, not just transactions for today.
partnershipPrinciples.detail: Our approach to partnerships is fundamentally different from traditional trading relationships. We invest time in understanding our partners' long-term goals and market challenges.

partnershipPrinciples.title: Mutual Growth
partnershipPrinciples.description: Success is shared — when our partners grow, we grow together.
partnershipPrinciples.detail: We believe that the best partnerships are those where all parties benefit and grow together. Our business model is designed to align our success with our partners' success.

partnershipPrinciples.title: Cultural Respect
partnershipPrinciples.description: Understanding and respecting diverse business cultures creates stronger bonds.
partnershipPrinciples.detail: International trade is fundamentally about connecting different cultures. We invest heavily in cultural understanding and sensitivity.

partnershipPrinciples.title: Transparent Communication
partnershipPrinciples.description: Open, honest communication builds trust and prevents misunderstandings.
partnershipPrinciples.detail: We maintain open channels of communication, provide regular updates, and address challenges head-on before they become problems.

certifications.name: APEDA
certifications.fullName: Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority
certifications.description: Registration-Cum-Membership Certificate (RCMC) with APEDA, the apex body promoting India's Agri exports globally.

certifications.name: Startup India Recognition
certifications.fullName: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
certifications.description: Recognition under Startup India initiative, validating our innovation-driven business model in international trade.

certifications.name: Spices Board of India
certifications.fullName: Spices Board, Ministry of Commerce & Industry
certifications.description: Authorized registration with India's regulatory and export promotion authority for spices and spice products.

certifications.name: Tea Board of India
certifications.fullName: Tea Board, Ministry of Commerce & Industry
certifications.description: Official license to export Indian tea under Tea Board compliance and global promotion framework.

certifications.name: Coffee Board of India
certifications.fullName: Coffee Board, Ministry of Commerce & Industry
certifications.description: Registered exporter under Coffee Board of India for promoting high-quality Indian coffee globally.

certifications.name: CEPCI
certifications.fullName: Cashew Export Promotion Council of India
certifications.description: Certified member of CEPCI, promoting Indian cashew kernel and value-added products in international markets.
